caption: Fig. 1. AI-led test generation flow

caption: Fig. 2. AI-led refactoring flow
description2: This diagram depicts a step-by-step process of AI-driven code transformation, showcasing the iterative refinement of software architecture.

caption: Fig. 3. LOC difference pre- and post-refactor
description2: The figure plots the difference in LOC (Lines of Code) between a pre-refactored and post-refactored codebase.
